title: luzula luzulina
intro: Luzula luzulina, also known as Wood Rush, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Juncaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Luzula luzulina include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe sore throats, and alleviate congestion. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for internal use, or made into poultices for topical application.
